name: Infinitrack River Stormer
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>無</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>む</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>限</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>起</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>動</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>どう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>リヴァーストーム
desc:
2 Level 5 monsters
When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle: You can attach that monster to this card as material. You can only use each of the following effects of "Infinitrack River Stormer" once per turn.
● You can detach 1 material from this card; take 1 EARTH Machine monster from your Deck, and either add it to your hand or send it to the GY.
● If this card is in your GY: You can Tribute 1 Machine Link Monster; Special Summon this card in Defense Position.

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
Attaches from your opponent's Graveyard as Xyz Material
Attaches from your opponent's Extra Deck as Xyz Material
Attaches your opponent's banished cards as Xyz Material
Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
